top.name: Death March
top.rules_text: Command all undead: each moves 2 tiles toward nearest enemy then attacks.

channel.name: Death March (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Undead gain +2 damage on this attack

bottom.name: Ritual Ground
bottom.rules_text: Imbue a tile with Necrotic: summon spells targeting this tile cost 2 less. Lasts 3 turns.

channel.name: Ritual Ground (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Necrotic tiles also heal undead standing on them for 1 at turn start
